name: Vue app boilerplate
description: Creates a minimal Vue app with Boilersuit generators.

placeholders.label: Project name
placeholders.description: Used in package.json, README, and app metadata.

placeholders.label: Base URL
placeholders.description: The Vite base path for the deployed app.

placeholders.label: Site title
placeholders.description: Used for the HTML title and social sharing metadata.

placeholders.label: Site description
placeholders.description: Used for the page description and social sharing metadata.
placeholders.placeholder: A short description of the site.

placeholders.label: Site URL
placeholders.description: The canonical production URL used in social sharing metadata.

placeholders.label: Theme colour
placeholders.description: Browser and icon theme colour metadata.

placeholders.label: API base URL
placeholders.description: The base URL used by the fetch API helper.

placeholders.label: API type
placeholders.description: Chooses which starter API helper and query generator imports to keep.
